fields.title: sandbox: remove stdout logging from /sandbox in headless mode
fields.description:
Current:
- `extensions/tau/src/sandbox/index.ts` uses `console.log(buildSandboxSummary())` when `!ctx.hasUI`.

Goal:
- Replace with `pi.sendMessage(..., { triggerTurn: false })` or equivalent UI-safe output that doesn't spam stdout or leak into model context.

DoD:
- No `console.log` usage from tau extensions for user-facing output.
- Manual smoke: headless /sandbox produces readable output.
fields.close_reason: Done: replaced console.log with pi.sendMessage in showSandboxSettings for headless mode.
